description: A compact nylon pouch for first aid items.  The straps inside the pouch allow for better sorting of different types of aid.

variants.description: A compact nylon pouch for first aid items.  Elastic straps inside are designed to hold common varieties of medical supplies, such as bandages, tourniquets, trauma sheers, or medical gloves.  <variant:multicam>
